name: Popovers and Pineapple Fritters
recipeInstructions:
For Popovers: Blend all ingredients in a blender or Cuisinart until just combined. Do not overblend. Half fill 8 buttered 1/2-cup metal molds and set on a preheated baking sheet at 425 degrees F. Bake for 30 minutes or until well puffed and crisp.
For Pineapple Fritters: Leftover pancake batter makes good Pineapple Fritters. Dip slices in flour, then pancake batter and fry in a small amount of hot fat. Drain. Good with ham, pork, etc.
